calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-13-296531 The Estate of Nirmala Lachmandas Daryanani and PES-13-296532 The Estate of Lachmandas Doulatram Daryanani

Appearances: Ameet Matharu in Propria Persona.

Mr. Mathura stated that he took over the case from another Attorney that left the firm, that he was not part of the billing arrangement, that he is billing on an hourly basis, that there is a cap so that it won't exceed $3,500.00 and that currently the total bill is less than $5,000.00. Mr. Mathura also stated that he has not gone over the statutory amount and that there is $123,898.28 cash on hand for each Estate. Both Petitions for Final Distribution were taken under submission. The Court directed Counsel to review Probate Code 10804 for future reference.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Y. Watts. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-13-296531 The Estate of Nirmala Lachmandas Daryanani and PES-13-296532 The Estate of Lachmandas Doulatram Daryanani.

Appearances: Ameet Matharu in Propria Persona.

Mr. Matharu stated that the bank was unwilling to distribute anything, that the two certificates of deposit total a little under $250,000.00 and provided an endorsed copy of a Proof of Service on case number 296531. The Court granted both Petitions for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
